overview.ko: Constellium SE는 Basic Materials 분야 Aluminum 기업입니다.
overview.en: Constellium SE, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of rolled and extruded aluminum products for the aerospace, packaging, automotive, commercial transportation, general industrial, and defense end-markets.

summary.ko: Constellium SE(CSTM)는 복합 점수 91.4로 임계 70.0를 상회했습니다. 성장·밸류·모멘텀 균형이 양호합니다.
summary.en: Constellium SE (CSTM) cleared the 70.0 threshold with composite score 91.4; growth, valuation, and momentum align.

growth.ko: 매출 성장 24.4% / 이익 성장 100.0% 수준으로 성장 점수 100.0입니다.
growth.en: Revenue growth 24.4% and earnings growth 100% yield growth score 100.0.

valuation.en: At P/E 9.42 and PEG 0.4, valuation score is 87.2.

quality.en: ROE 45.65%, operating margin basis — quality score 72.1.

risks.ko: 실적 가이던스 하향 시 성장 프리미엄 축소 가능
risks.en: Growth premium may compress on guidance cuts

risks.ko: 글로벌 금리·유동성 변화에 따른 밸류에이션 리레이팅
risks.en: Valuation re-rating risk from rates and liquidity
10x in five years is a scenario, not a guarantee
